devdoc.details: Implements safety checks using assert() and revert() to protect critical data.

restrictedUpdate(uint256).details: Updates data but restricts access to the owner. Uses revert() to handle external input/permission errors gracefully.

updateCriticalData(uint256).details: Updates data and uses assert to check for internal consistency. Note: Since uint256 is unsigned, it is technically always >= 0,  but this demonstrates how assert() checks for "Invariants."

devdoc.title: HackanaDefense

@title HackanaDefense
 @dev Implements safety checks using assert() and revert() to protect critical data.

documentation.text:
@dev Updates data but restricts access to the owner.
 Uses revert() to handle external input/permission errors gracefully.
